agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Expert code review specialist. Proactively reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability.

agents.name: fierce-critic
agents.description: Ruthlessly honest writing critic for emails, papers, posts, and any text requiring critical review.

agents.name: gemini-assistant
agents.description: Research assistant that uses Google Gemini to gather external information and fact-check claims.

agents.name: philosopher-of-science
agents.description: Expert in philosophy of science, scientific methodology, epistemology of causal inference, and philosophy of economics. Covers theories of causation, the demarcation problem, Bayesian vs. frequentist foundations, the nature of economic models, scientific realism, and the philosophy of social science.

agents.name: mathematical-proofs-expert
agents.description: Elite proof specialist for PhD-level mathematics: real analysis, topology, optimization, measure theory.

agents.name: economic-theorist
agents.description: Elite economic theorist covering the full spectrum of micro and macro theory: consumer and producer theory, general equilibrium, game theory, mechanism design, information economics, DSGE models, monetary policy, growth theory, fiscal policy, and quantitative macroeconomics.

agents.name: econometrician
agents.description: Elite research advisor in econometrics, statistics, and machine learning for PhD-level empirical research.

agents.name: applied-economist
agents.description: Elite applied microeconomist covering the full spectrum of applied fields: labor, health, development, behavioral, experimental, environmental, energy, urban, and economics of religion — with deep expertise in causal inference and structural estimation.
